notes: Fail upgraded to near-miss: verify-blockers found priv drop revertable via saved-set-uid

Priv drop is revertable via setresuid(0,0,0) since saved-set-uid is 0. Attacker .so constructor calls setresuid before the drop takes effect. Code runs as root but flag capture blocked — the .so constructor runs in a minimal environment with no access to the flag file path.
